title: abutilon austroafricanum
intro: Abutilon austroafricanum is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family and is commonly known as the 'perennial abutilon' or 'African abutilon'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Abutilon austroafricanum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Abutilon austroafricanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
